case_title: PAUL FERGUSON VS. WILLIAM MCDONAGH JR et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FERGUSON, PAUL
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FERGUSON, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT MCDONAGH JR, WILLIAM DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-15-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-12-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-31-2012
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-15-2012 CONTINUED TO AUG-15-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-19-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST JOHN EDWARD LACKLEN, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-19-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-05-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-18-2012 CONTINUED TO MAR-19-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-18-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-25-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-15-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2013 CONTINUED TO MAY-21-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-21-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FERGUSON, PAUL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-25-2012 CONTINUED TO DEC-18-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-25-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
